creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
Same problem exists with Ghostscript9: "make install" fails because
'./epag-3.09/ert' doesn't exist. Manually CD'ing to <work><port><epag/>
and doing MAKE, creates the required "ert" executable.

One possible suggestion: add a CD and MAKE command to the port Makefile
"pre-install" section to compile the required "ert" code.
